summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Qradient AI Consulting website. Backend API achieved 100% success rate (25/25 tests). Frontend functionality including landing page, contact form, job listings, and admin dashboard all working correctly. Integration between frontend and backend is solid.
passed_tests: Contact CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Job CRUD operations with status toggle
Application CRUD operations with status management
Error handling for invalid IDs and statuses
Landing page loads with all sections (hero, about, jobs, contact)
Contact form submission and database integration
Admin dashboard loads with real-time stats
Contact form clears after successful submission
Frontend-backend integration for all major flows
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (25/25 tests), Frontend: ~95% (browser stability issues during intensive testing)
